name: Baked Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light Whole Wheat Roll, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the tips of the squash.
2. Cut each squash into 3-4 pieces and place them in a large saucepan with enough boiling water to cover.
3. Return the water to a boil, then reduce the heat and cook until the squash is tender.
4. Drain the squash and mash it, reserving some liquid.
5. Combine the mashed squash and reserved liquid with the Ener-G Egg Replacer, crumbled whole wheat roll, brown sugar, salt, onion, and pepper.
6. Transfer the mixture into a lightly greased or sprayed 3-quart casserole dish.
7. Cover with a light layer of crumbled whole wheat roll.
8. Bake at 350°F until lightly browned.
